health_conditions: on HRT with testosterone and estrogen pellets

benefits.description: Support for body composition and healthy aging

side_effects.description: Mild itching at injection site for 9-10 weeks

Severe mast cell activation event at week 10: intense itching all over lower abdomen and back, 4 bumps swelled up at prior injection sites, severe abdominal and uterine cramping like labor pain radiating down legs and into lower back, lasted for hours

protocol_notes: Sermorelin vial kept for 10+ weeks (provider said safe for 3 months). Reaction occurred on day 8 of menstrual cycle (peak estrogen, low progesterone). Also consumed red wine evening of reaction. Previous good tolerance of CJC+Ipamorelin and TB-500. On micronized progesterone in addition to HRT pellets. Recovery protocol included Quercetin 500mg 2x/day, Vitamin C 1000mg/day, Magnesium glycinate, Zyrtec daily x 3-5 days, low-histamine diet and hydration.
